tools.name: inspect_cdm_json
tools.description: CDM JSON inspection: full structural tree, type_summary, type_registry, enums_used, ref/location hints, and import guidance. If the serialized result exceeds the max tool message size (FPML_JAVA_GEN_MAX_TOOL_CHARS), the agent returns a stub with stored=true and a handle; retrieve lossless bytes via compact_context or fetch_payload.

json_path.description: Path to the CDM JSON file

detail.description: Backward-compatible; inspect always returns the full structural view from this tool. Oversized responses are externalized by the agent with a handle.

tools.name: lookup_cdm_schema
tools.description: JSON Schema for a CDM type: properties, $ref, required, Java class, setter hints.

type_name.description: CDM type or schema stem (e.g. Trade, SettlementPayout)

tools.name: resolve_java_type
tools.description: Resolve schema $ref to FQN, package, builder, import line.

tools.name: list_enum_values
tools.description: Enum JSON values and java_constant names; may warn on odd punctuation.

tools.name: get_java_template
tools.description: Boilerplate Java with IMPORTS_PLACEHOLDER and BUILDER_CODE_PLACEHOLDER.

tools.name: write_java_file
tools.description: Write full Java source to generated/ (overwrites).

tools.name: read_java_file
tools.description: Read generated Java file (default active target).

tools.name: patch_java_file
tools.description: Replace via old_text/new_text or batch patches: [{old_text, new_text}, ...].

tools.name: compile_java
tools.description: javac vs CDM classpath; structured errors, repeated_error_patterns when applicable.

tools.name: run_java
tools.description: Run compiled class; stdout expected CDM JSON.

tools.name: validate_output
tools.description: Validate JSON against official CDM Trade schema (resolved $ref).

tools.name: store_large_payload
tools.description: Store an oversized (or important) JSON string and return a handle for later retrieval (lossless).

kind.description: Namespace/kind tag for the stored payload

payload_json.description: The exact JSON/text string to store

tools.name: fetch_payload
tools.description: Fetch a slice of a previously stored payload by handle (lossless paging).

tools.name: compact_context
tools.description: Lossless paging of a stored payload by handle (same bytes as fetch_payload). Use after any tool returned stored=true. Adds provenance and next_step; does not summarize or drop data.

tools.name: finish
tools.description: End task: success or failure + summary.
